text:
On Mon, 2006-08-28 at 21:41 +0200, Hans Petter Selasky wrote:

> How are things going with the new USB driver, or more specifically "if_ural" ? 
> Any more problems ?

Well honestly .. i am getting occasional random system reboots ... but i
haven't been able to get any kernel dumps for those so i can't say what
is causing them yet. So far network seems stable though.

  Pascal Hofstee
